en.startup.recovery.invalid_state: The saved app configuration was invalid and has been reset to defaults.
en.startup.recovery.invalid_state.backup_fo: The saved app configuration was invalid and has been reset to defaults. A backup was saved as %@.
en.startup.recovery.sanitized: Some saved projects or terminal layout data were invalid and were repaired automatically.
en.startup.recovery.title: Recovered App Data

zh-Hans.startup.recovery.invalid_state: 检测到已保存的应用配置无效，现已恢复为默认配置。
zh-Hans.startup.recovery.invalid_state.backup_fo: 检测到已保存的应用配置无效，现已恢复为默认配置，并已备份为 %@。
zh-Hans.startup.recovery.sanitized: 部分已保存的项目或终端布局数据存在异常，现已自动修复。
zh-Hans.startup.recovery.status: 已恢复异常的应用保存数据。
zh-Hans.startup.recovery.title: 已恢复应用数据
